original_text:
### Iconography
- Style: **minimal line illustration** for clarity and quick recall. New icons are permitted but **must match this stylistic approach** (consistent stroke weight, rounded line caps, single-color line work).
- Icon colors and backgrounds adjustable **only within the brand palette**.
- Consider scale and contrast for low-vision audiences. [GENERAL: minimum render size 32×32px in email; default Brand Blue strokes on light backgrounds.]

relations.note: The approved icon style and palette restriction jointly govern icon construction.
Both general email rules support legible, contrast-conscious icon rendering.

quotes: Style: **minimal line illustration** for clarity and quick recall. New icons are permitted but **must match this stylistic approach** (consistent stroke weight, rounded line caps, single-color line work).

Style: **minimal line illustration** for clarity and quick recall. New icons are permitted but **must match this stylistic approach** (consistent stroke weight, rounded line caps, single-color line work).

rules.intent: Preserve a clear, recognizable icon system that supports quick recall.
rules.rule_text: Icons must use minimal line illustration; any new icon must match the approved approach, including consistent stroke weight, rounded line caps, and single-color line work.

quotes: Icon colors and backgrounds adjustable **only within the brand palette**.
Icon colors and backgrounds adjustable **only within the brand palette**.

rules.intent: Maintain visual consistency while permitting palette-based adaptation.
rules.rule_text: Icon colors and backgrounds may be adjusted only within the brand palette.

quotes: [GENERAL: minimum render size 32×32px in email; default Brand Blue strokes on light backgrounds.]
Consider scale and contrast for low-vision audiences. [GENERAL: minimum render size 32×32px in email; default Brand Blue strokes on light backgrounds.]

rules.intent: Keep email icons legible and usable for low-vision audiences.
rules.rule_text: For email, icons must render at no less than 32×32px, with scale and contrast considered for low-vision audiences.

quotes: default Brand Blue strokes on light backgrounds.
[GENERAL: minimum render size 32×32px in email; default Brand Blue strokes on light backgrounds.]

rules.intent: Provide a consistent, contrast-conscious default icon treatment.
rules.rule_text: On light email backgrounds, icons should use Brand Blue (#00529b) strokes by default.
